name: Asx Limited
analysis: ASX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$52.0000, stop A$47.3022, target A$59.9500 (1.69:1) — then trail it.
